summary: CuratedConciergeSection (Handpicked for Pet) now working on ALL pillar pages. Backend was updated with care_concierge_cards.py and universal_pillar_cards.py to provide cards for all pillars. All 7 tested pillars (Care, Stay, Travel, Learn, Enjoy, Fit, Shop) now show CONCIERGE® PRODUCT and CONCIERGE® SERVICE badges in the dark glass-card-dark container when user is logged in.

minor.issue: WebSocket connections (wss://...) are failing with 1006 errors but reconnecting successfully. Not blocking functionality but creates console noise.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend intelligence_layer.py correctly imports and handles care_concierge_cards.py (line 636-639) and universal_pillar_cards.py (line 641-648)
API endpoint /api/mira/curated-set/{petId}/{pillar} returns 3 products + 1 service for all tested pillars
CuratedConciergeSection component renders correctly when userPets data is available (requires login)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (CuratedConciergeSection rendering on all tested pillars when logged in)

context_for_next_testing_agent: CuratedConciergeSection is now fully working on all pillar pages. Backend API confirmed working for: care, stay, travel, learn, enjoy, fit, shop (all returning 3 products + 1 service). Frontend renders 'Handpicked for {PetName}' header with CONCIERGE® PRODUCT/SERVICE badges in glass-card-dark container. Note: Section only visible when user is logged in (requires userPets data).
